key_themes: Strong earnings beats and raised guidance
Frequent analyst upgrades and price target hikes ($300+)
summary: Investor and analyst sentiment toward Lam Research (LRCX) is strongly positive as of mid-April 2026. Explosive AI-related demand for its chip manufacturing tools has driven multiple earnings beats, revenue growth above 20% in recent quarters, and optimistic guidance, prompting widespread price target increases to $300 and higher from firms like Deutsche Bank, Stifel, and Susquehanna. While the stock has rallied and trades near $260-267 with a consensus Buy rating, some notes highlight cyclical risks and elevated valuations ahead of the April 22 quarterly report.
sources: 25+ recent news articles and analyst reports (Q1-Q2 2026), 40+ X posts (March-April 2026, semantic + keyword search)
